title: AgentBoundary
description: Whitelist-mode permission boundary for an agent. Any operation not in allowed_actions is denied.

allowed_actions.description: Explicitly allowed actions. Default deny applies to everything else.

denied_actions.description: Explicitly denied actions. approve_own_output must be in this list.

result_scope.description: Paths where agent may write result.json.

artifact_scope.description: Paths where agent may write artifacts.

read_disclosure_only.description: V0.1 fixed to true — RuntimeGuard checks source_refs against forbidden_read, does not intercept actual reads.

forbidden_read.description: Paths agent must not read. Highest priority — overrides read_scope.
